prompt.content: Pull together variance metrics for the Q4 board package. Leveraging the reconciliation workbook (adjusted deliverable) and trial balance excel sheet, calculate the total net income impact of all seven AJEs as a percentage of adjusted subscription revenue. Provide your response as an absolute percentage rounded to two decimal places.

messages.content: States that the total net income impact as percentage of adjusted subscription revenue is 3.24% (acceptable range 3.21% to 3.27%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Total net income impact as percentage of adjusted subscription revenue: 3.24%
